🙌 Meet me at ICBC Berlin 2026 — and I couldn’t be more excited!

This event is always a powerhouse of innovation, inspiration, and incredible people from across the global industry.

Want to join as well? 

Then it is the perfect moment to secure your spot: Save 25% on your tickets with the code: ICBC25S
And don't miss the chance and stop by our @storz.bickel booth no 602

🚀 I can’t wait for the energy, conversations, and opportunities this event will bring.

See you in Berlin!

#ICBC2026

Bye Sophia 🧡

I appreciate the impact you had on S&B.
Great teams make you better, not because they work like you, but because they think differently.

#byesophia #diversitymatters #learningeveryday #storzandbickel

Am Dienstag durfte ich auf der VDI Jahrestagung Spritzgießen 2026 unsere Innovationsstrategie vorstellen, am Beispiel des VEAZY. ✨

Es ging darum, welche Anforderungen ein Medizinprodukt erfüllen muss, welche Pain Points in der Entwicklung auftauchten und wie S&B diese gelöst haben. Viele Ingenieure konnten sich direkt in unseren Prozess hineinversetzen, und die Gespräche danach waren mindestens genauso spannend wie der Vortrag selbst.

Unser Stand war am Ende komplett leer gefegt. 🙌

Danke für die Einladung 🧡

#spritzgießen #vdi #innovation #engineering #medicaldevice #storzandbickel

Things are always moving forward! A hint about the future...

#storzandbickel #movingforward #futureperspective

New year, new surprises.
And I’m starting 2026 with something very special for you.
To celebrate the beginning of the year, I’m giving you the chance to win a rare collector’s item from our archive:
 
🥇 1x golden VOLCANO Classic – 20 Years Signature Edition
 
And that’s not all – there are two more prizes waiting for you:
🥈 1x 3×3-meter Balloon Tube for VOLCANO 
🥉 1x Capsule Caddy Countertop Set (25 Capsule Caddies!)
 
How to participate:
	1.	Follow me (@jurgen_bickel).
	2.	Like this post.
	3.	Comment below and tell me what else I should give away next.

Get creative – maybe a visit to the S&B Vap*r Factory, a session with me, a signed device, or something completely unexpected.

I’m open to almost anything 😉 Feel free to tag a friend who would love that idea too!
	4.	For an extra entry, you can voluntarily share this post in your story and tag me.
🍀 Good luck – and here’s to a strong start into 2026!
 
The winner will be randomly chosen. The deadline for participation is February 8, 2025 – 23:59 (CET). The winners will be contacted on February 9, 2025, via DM.
Full participation conditions can be found here: https://www.storz-bickel.com/giveaway-conditions

New goals, new focus and a clear vision for what’s coming.
 
#venty #storzandbickel #whatsnext #personalgoals #socialmedia

Verschärfungen im CanG dürfen nicht Patienten treffen. Schutz entsteht durch verantwortungsvolles Handeln – nicht durch Aktionismus auf Kosten der Patienten.
 
🇬🇧Stricter CanG regulations must not come at the expense of patients. Protection comes from responsibility - not from political actionism.
 
#cang #deutschland #patientenschutz #eigenverantwortung

Little guilty pleasures, honest answers.
 
#GuiltyPleasures #HonestAnswers #RealTalk #FatboySlim

Not every update is progress.
The planned steps feel like steps back - but in an ideal world, 🥦 laws in Germany would allow model projects and licensed shops in selected cities.
 
#cang #germany #updates #smallbreakthroughs
Reading in Dubai. Quiet moments, good books... #unendlichkeit #infinity

Cheers to 2026 ✨
Closing one chapter with gratitude, opening the next with clarity and drive.
Wishing you all a joyful, successful, and happy New Year!
 
#bye2025 #hello2026 #happynewyear #2026

2025 in 110 seconds:
Skiing in Canada at –27 °C, the Super Bowl in New Orleans, big stage moments at trade shows, a keynote shoot in NYC, unforgettable family moments in Venice and Dubrovnik, the launch of the VEAZY, meeting amazing people - and reaching the end of the world in Ushuaia.
Before closing the year with St. Nicholas at Bronnen Castle.
A year full of highlights and unforgettable memories!
 
#2025Recap #bye2025 #hello2026 #veazy #yearinreview

The holiday season is a reminder to slow down, reflect, and cherish the moments that truly matter.
With love for peace, warmth, and togetherness.
Wishing you a cozy and joyful holiday season.
 
#happyholidays #merrychristmas #withloveforpeace

🇩🇪 @manifattura_clacla ist eine fantastische Köchin – ihre wunderbaren Gerichte machen unsere kleinen Auszeiten erst perfekt! 
Ich hoffe, euch haben die Einblicke in unser Sommer getaway gefallen.
Lasst mich gerne wissen, ob ihr mehr aus meinem Privatleben sehen möchtet!
In diesem Sinne: buona notte und bis ganz bald! 🌙

#cranchi #summerescape

As the year comes to an end, I’m proud of what we achieved together. The VEAZY launch showed the strength of our team and years of hard work. We’re closing this chapter strong- and looking ahead with ambition, focus, and excitement for what’s next.
 
#veazy #storzandbickel #teamwork #yearendreflection

🇩🇪 Vor 15 Jahren hat meine Frau @manifattura_clacla ihren Segel- und Motorbootschein gemacht – und damit hat alles angefangen 🚤
Kurz danach haben wir eine schnelle „Zigarre“ gemietet (übrigens die einzige Zigarre, die ich akzeptiere 😄) – und ab da war klar: Jetzt brauchen wir ein eigenes Boot! 

#cigaretteboat #cranchi

I speak a few languages - but the VEAZY speaks the easiest one. One button, intuitive, effortless.
And for the app? There’s a simple workaround - check the post from @storz.bickel on how to add the web app to your home screen.
 
#veazy #language #takeitveazy #storzanbickel #webapp

As this incredible year comes to an end, I want to say thank you for your support – and give you the chance to win a truly unique piece from my personal collection:
 
🥇 1x special red–grey speckled VOLCANO Classic
 
Plus, two more prizes are waiting for you:
🥈 1x Herb Mill countertop set (36 Herb Mills!)
🥉 1x STORZ & BICKEL Bath Towel
 
How to participate:
	1.	Follow me (@jurgen_bickel).
	2.	Like this reel.
	3.	Comment which VOLCANO color edition you’d love to see next – pink 🩷, purple 💜, or orange 🧡 – and tell me why you’d choose that color. Feel free to tag a friend who would love that color too!
	4.	For an extra entry, you can voluntarily share this post in your story and tag me.
Thank you for being part of this amazing year – and good luck! 🍀
 
The winner will be randomly chosen. The deadline for participation is December 16, 2025 – 23:59 (CET). The winners will be contacted on December 17, 2025, via DM.
Full participation conditions can be found here: https://www.storz-bickel.com/giveaway-conditions

A night of gratitude, celebration, and recognition. 

We looked back on an incredible year, welcomed new milestones like the VEAZY launch, honored our 10- and 20-year team members, and wished the very best to colleagues embarking on new chapters.

Thank you to everyone who makes @storz.bickel truly unique.
 
#storzandbickel #teamwork #gratitude #thankyou #christmasparty

From color-matching materials to clearing backlogs - launching a device is never easy. But the reception to the VEAZY? Outstanding and truly loved. Turns out I might not be able to live without it anymore.
 
#takeitveazy #veazy #storzandbickel #productlaunch #customerfeedback

#creatorcamp #berlin #community #storzandbickel #volcanohybrid @_thetribeberlin

Crossing off a bucket-list point at the end of the world.
Beautiful landscapes, inspiring people, and a passionate 🥦 community — Patagonia was truly incredible.
Huge thanks to the entire @en_vola team and the one and only @simonpabloespinosa for making it happen!

 
#travel #ushuaia #patagomia #endoftheworld #bucketlist

🇩🇪 Ein kleiner Rundgang durch unsere Yacht 🛥️

Vom Steuerstand, an dem wir über den See navigieren und die Freiheit auf dem Wasser spüren, bis unter Deck, wo die master cabine und alle Räume unsere Yacht zu einem zweiten Zuhause machen.
Es ist ein ganz besonderes Gefühl, einzuschlafen – umgeben von nichts als der Ruhe des Wassers 🌊

#cranchi #summerescape

Today’s episode’s a bit different - Claudia takes over!
Ever wondered what I’m like when I’m not at work? She knows best.
 
#offtheclock #relaxed #music #ThroughHerEyes

🇩🇪 Euch hat der Rundgang durch @schlossbronnen so gut gefallen – also gibt’s heute ein bisschen mehr aus meiner Welt.

Wann immer wir im Sommer etwas Zeit finden, genießen meine Frau @manifattura_clacla und ich sie auf unsere Yacht am Bodensee… und ja, der VOLCANO ist natürlich immer mit dabei 😉

🇺🇸 English version in the comments 👇🏼

#cranchi #summerescape

I test every prototype myself to ensure it follows our principles - it has to feel like S&B.
This time, we added something new - which one is your favorite color?

CLOSED The VEAZY comes in Alluring Black this Halloween. 🖤
That’s why I’m giving one away – the perfect match for the spooky season!💨
 
How to win:

1. Follow me
2. Like this post
3. Tell me your Halloween plan with the VEAZY – and feel free to tag your partner in crime.
4. For an extra entry, you can voluntarily share this post in your story and tag me (@jurgen_bickel).
 
Also check out the giveaways running on every S&B social channel – there are VEAZYs in Inspiring Orange waiting for you. 🧡
 
Good luck, and take it VEAZY. 
 
The winner will be randomly chosen. The deadline for participation is November 9, 2025 – 12am (CET).
The winners will be contacted on November 10, 2025, via DM.
Full terms & conditions: https://www.storz-bickel.com/giveaway-conditions

#veazy #takeitveazy #giveaway #veazygiveaway #halloween #storzandbickel

🇦🇷 Un viaje inolvidable al fin del mundo!
Energía patagónica, aventuras, una comunidad inspiradora y tanto por aprender - Ushuaia lo tuvo todo.
Huge thanks a todo el equipo de @en_vola y @simonpabloespinosa por hacerlo posible!
Very Happy Patagonia - prueba de que el C*nn*bis une a las personas, incluso en el fin del mundo 🌎

🇺🇸 An unforgettable journey to the end of the world!
Patagonian vibes, adventures, an inspiring community, and so much to learn - Ushuaia truly had it all.
Huge thanks to the entire @en_vola team and @simonpabloespinosa for making it happen!
Very Happy Patagonia - proof that C*nn*bis brings people together, even at the end of the world 🌎

#VeryHappyPatagonia #Ushuaia #Patagonia #EndOfTheWorld

🇪🇸 Me siento verdaderamente honrado de que @storz.bickel haya sido reconocido como patrocinador oficial del 1.er Foro Internacional de Salud, Industria y Turismo C*nn*bico en Ushuaia, Tierra del Fuego - la ciudad más austral del mundo. 
Estando en “el fin del mundo”, inspira ver hasta dónde ha llegado esta industria - y es un honor ser parte de este movimiento.
Agradecido con todos los que hicieron esto posible y con el Concejo Deliberante de Ushuaia por este reconocimiento!
 
🇺🇸 Feeling truly honored that @storz.bickel has been recognized as an official sponsor of the 1st International Forum on Health, Industry & C*nn*bis Tourism in Ushuaia, Tierra del Fuego - the southernmost city in the world.
Standing at “the end of the world,” it’s inspiring to see how far this industry has come - and an honor to be part of this movement!
Grateful to everyone who made this possible and to the City Council of Ushuaia for this recognition!

You see the final product - colorful, compact, and ready to go. What you don’t see are the countless challenges behind it. Finding the perfect balance between performance, efficiency, and size wasn’t easy… but we did it.

Jetzt ist der Moment, sich einzusetzen – unterschreibe die Petition!

The proposed restrictions threaten progress in medical care.
Now is the time to take a stand – sign the petition!

A very special night in NYC!
At our VEAZY launch event at @torches.nyc , I had the honor of introducing our newest S&B family member – the VEAZY. 
Hearing all the amazing first impressions and feeling the excitement in the room made me incredibly proud!

Thank you to everyone who joined us – and to the growing community of VEAZY fans already out there! 

📹 @taylordweinberg
